message:
feat(widgets): add galaxy-brain decision card widget (bd-1lg.8)

Progressive-disclosure widget rendering Bayesian decision transparency:
- Level 0: traffic light badge (OK/WARN/ALERT) + action label
- Level 1: plain English explanation
- Level 2: evidence terms with direction indicators (+/-/~)
- Level 3: full Bayesian details (log-posterior, CI, loss)

Feature-gated behind `galaxy-brain` flag with optional ftui-runtime dep.
12 unit tests, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
